expectations.text: Template exposes --card-bg under the Cards section

expectations.text: components.css defines --card-bg defaulting to var(--card), not a raw primitive
expectations.evidence: `--card-bg: var(--card);` in :root Card section; also wired --color-card-bg in @theme inline.

expectations.text: Template --card-bg example is a consumer hex, not oklch/var
Pre-existing template tokens preserved (button-bg, badge-bg, radius, card-radius)

expectations.evidence: marker block (group:fine-tuning, block:cards) sits directly above the --card-bg declaration; generator regenerated template.
